productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Light Khaki Canvas Messenger Bag
description: Designed for everyday use, this messenger bag from wrangler is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. With ample space to stash away daily belongings, it makes for a perfect bag to college as well as work.Made of canvas with complete protective nylon lining for easy cleaning and durabilityButtons holders and straps made of synthetic leatherTwo fabric compartments on the front held together by buttons and fastened by leather belts One main compartment Wide adjustable strap for customising the lengthLeather patchwork below the base for added durability and structureCareDo not washDo not dry-cleanUse mild brush to remove dust if necessary
